meta.methodology: Hot loop = 3rd consecutive timed execution after data resident in process. DuckDB: table loaded once per (threads, row_count); Rust: load_cols inside binary before timed loop. Load never in hot_us.
meta.description: SSB flat table Q1–Q5 scaling benchmark (hot-loop latency).
meta.metric: hot_us — microseconds for the 3rd consecutive timed query execution
meta.plot_metric: Mean of Q1–Q5 hot_us converted to milliseconds

bare_rust.note: hot_us is 3rd timed RunQuery; load is before timer inside process
